cloudformation.macro.FunctionName.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the underlying AWS Lambda function that you want AWS CloudFormation to invoke when the macro is run.

cloudformation.macro.LogGroupName.Description: The CloudWatch Logs group to which AWS CloudFormation sends error logging information when invoking the macro's underlying AWS Lambda function.

cloudformation.macro.LogRoleARN.Description: The ARN of the role AWS CloudFormation should assume when sending log entries to CloudWatch Logs.

cloudformation.macro.Name.Description: The name of the macro. The name of the macro must be unique across all macros in the account.
